overall_justification: This edition primarily focuses on historical and logistical details surrounding the establishment of the Curso Jurídico in São Paulo, using the former Convento de São Francisco. While it mentions the "Caixa de Conversão" briefly in relation to a Câmara Federal committee's review of proposed amendments, this mention is purely informational and doesn't reveal the newspaper's stance on the monetary debate itself. The dominant theme of the edition is the historical context of the law school's founding, not the economic arguments around the Caixa de Conversão.

supporting_evidence.quote: A Commissão de Finanças da Câmara Federal, reunida ante-hon- tem, assignou o parecer do sr. David Campista, sobre as emendas offerecidas ao projecto da Caixa de Conversão.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This is the most direct mention of the "Caixa de Conversão," but it's purely factual reporting on procedural matters in the Câmara.

supporting_evidence.quote: Assignarem vencidos os srs. Paula Ramos e Cornelio da Fon- seca. Cinco foram as emendas offero- cidas e estão assignadas pelos srs. R. Paixão, Barbosa Lima e Rodrigues Peixoto, sendo a deste um substitutivo.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This details the amendments to the Caixa de Conversão project, but without expressing an opinion on their merits or the overall project.

supporting_evidence.quote: O relator opinou pela rejeição de todas as emendas, menos a do sr. Rodolpho Paixão, assim con- cebida : «Ao art. 2.°,—onde se diz: «em prazo nunca menor de seis me- zes;—acrescente-se: um prazo nunca menor de doze mezes».
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This describes the content of one amendment, but doesn't offer any judgment on its implications for the Caixa de Conversão's effectiveness or desirability.
